description: Out-of-scope (ocd, canonical): description points clearly to ocd territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'ocd'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: I have intrusive thoughts about hurting people I love and I have to do mental rituals to make them go away — counting to certain numbers, repeating phrases, going back through my day to check that I didn't actually do anything. It takes hours and I'm exhausted.
